testcase.name: tests.test_full_system_check
testcase.error:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:879: in import_plugin __import__(importspec) E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pytest_ordering'
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/runner.py:353: in from_call result: TResult | None = func() ^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/runner.py:398: in collect return list(collector.collect()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:563: in collect self._register_setup_module_fixture() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:576: in _register_setup_module_fixture self.obj, ("setUpModule", "setup_module") ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:289: in obj self._obj = obj = self._getobj() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:560: in _getobj return importtestmodule(self.path, self.config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:552: in importtestmodule config.pluginmanager.consider_module(mod) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:845: in consider_module self._import_plugin_specs(getattr(mod, "pytest_plugins", [])) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:852: in _import_plugin_specs self.import_plugin(import_spec) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:881: in import_plugin raise ImportError( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:879: in import_plugin __import__(importspec) E ImportError: Error importing plugin "pytest_ordering": No module named 'pytest_ordering'
